description:
Real-time hardware monitor for Windows gaming PCs

RIGStats is a free, open-source hardware monitor for Windows gaming PCs with a dedicated
secondary display. It shows CPU, GPU, RAM, network, disk, motherboard, and process data in
real time across portrait, landscape, and floating panel layouts.

Sensor data comes from LibreHardwareMonitor (kernel-level temps, clocks, power, fan speeds),
the sysinfo crate (CPU load, disk I/O, network throughput, processes), and WMI (GPU model,
RAM spec, battery, system brand). That means per-core clocks, GPU hot-spot temperature, D3D
engine workloads, DDR5 DIMM temperature, and NVMe temperature — not just OS counters.

No telemetry. No accounts. No cloud sync. MIT license.
